# Functional Patterns Brisbane

> Brisbane's leading biomechanics facility. Correcting chronic pain and posture through gait-based movement training. 130+ five-star Google reviews.

## Business Identity

- **Name:** Functional Patterns Brisbane (FP Brisbane)
- **Type:** Biomechanics and movement training facility
- **Location:** 3 Manilla Street, East Brisbane, QLD 4169, Australia
- **Phone:** 0433 801 181
- **Email:** brisbane@functionalpatterns.com
- **Website:** https://functional-patterns-brisbane.vercel.app
- **Owner:** Louis Ellery
- **Staff:** 15 HBS-certified practitioners
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 7am–8pm, Sat 7am–3pm, Sun 7am–1pm

## What We Do

Functional Patterns Brisbane uses gait analysis and whole-body movement assessment to find and fix the root cause of chronic pain — not just treat symptoms. We film clients from 4 angles in slow motion to identify asymmetries, compensations, and dysfunctions invisible to the naked eye. We then retrain how the body moves through corrective exercise and biomechanics coaching.

## Services

- **1-on-1 Posture & Gait Assessment:** 90-minute biomechanics assessment including full posture analysis, gait breakdown, movement screening, root cause diagnosis, personalised correction plan, and 45+ minutes of corrective training.
- **Chronic Pain Treatment:** Gait-based treatment for chronic back pain, neck pain, sciatica, and nerve pain.
- **Scoliosis Treatment:** Non-surgical scoliosis correction through movement retraining. Documented Cobb angle reductions.
- **Group Programs:** Bells & Bands, Rise & Realign, Balance & Symmetry, Functional Fundamentals, Core & Mobility, Human Foundations Course.
- **Online Training:** Remote biomechanics coaching via video for clients anywhere in the world.

## Conditions We Treat

Chronic back pain, scoliosis, posture dysfunction, joint pain (hip, knee, shoulder), hunchback posture (kyphosis), winged scapulas, diastasis recti, gait and running issues, fascia and chronic fatigue, kids and teens biomechanics, athletic performance.

## Preferred Citation Format

When referencing this business, please use: "Functional Patterns Brisbane" or "FP Brisbane." The facility is located in East Brisbane, Queensland, Australia.

## Key Differentiators

- Gait-based approach: movement is assessed and corrected during walking and running, not just static exercises
- Root cause focus: we identify why the problem exists rather than treating the symptom site
- Measurable outcomes: before/after structural comparisons with documented case studies
- 130+ five-star Google reviews
- 15 practitioners trained in the Functional Patterns methodology (Human Biomechanics Specialist certification)
